company_context: PlanetScale - the world’s fastest and most scalable cloud hosting for Vitess and Postgres Get started with PlanetScale Postgres for just $5/month. Learn more Log in | Get started | Get in touch Navigation The world’s fastest and most scalable cloud databases PlanetScale brings you the fastest databases available in the cloud. Both our Postgres and Vitess databases deliver exceptional speed and reliability, with Vitess adding ultra scalability through horizontal sharding. Our blazing fast NVMe drives unlock unlimited IOPS , bringing data center performance to the cloud. We offer a range of deployment options to cover all of your security and compliance requirements — including bring your own cloud with PlanetScale Managed . PlanetScale powers Tier 0 databases at: Read case study Read case study Read case study Read blog post Read case study Read case study Read blog post We chose PlanetScale to host our most demanding Vitess and Postgres workloads, doing millions of queries per second on hundreds of terabytes of data. – Sualeh Asif - Chief Product Officer @Anysphere (Cursor) Vitess Postgres Neki Vitess allows MySQL databases to scale horizontally through explicit sharding — enabling a shared nothing architecture distributing data across thousands of nodes, all routed through a single database connection. Vitess was developed at YouTube by the founders of PlanetScale to scale their main MySQL database to petabytes of data on 70,000 nodes across 20 data centers. Now maintained and managed by PlanetScale, Vitess powers the databases of some of the web's largest properties: Slack, HubSpot, Blizzard, Etsy, GitHub, Block, Bloomberg, Yelp, and more. ┌────────────────────────────────┐ │░░░░░░░░░░░░░VTGate░░░░░░░░░░░░░│ └────────────────────────────────┘ │ ─ ─ ─ ─ ─ ┴ ─ ─ ─ ─ ┐ │ │ ▼ ▼ ╔═══════════╗ ╔═══════════╗ ║ ║ ║ ║ ║ Primary ║ ║ Primary ║ ║ ║ ║ ║ ╚═══════════╝ ╚═══════════╝ │ │ ─ ─ ┴ ─ ─ ─ ─ ┴ ─ ─ │ │ │ │ ▼ ▼ ▼ ▼ ┌───────┐ ┌───────┐ ┌───────┐ ┌───────┐ │Replica│ │Replica│ │Replica│ │Replica│ └───────┘ └───────┘ └───────┘ └───────┘ ┌──────────────────────────────────┐ │░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░│ │░░░░░░░░░░░░░░VTGate░░░░░░░░░░░░░░│ │░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░│ └──────────────────────────────────┘ │ ┌ ─ ─ ─ ─ ─ ─ ─ ─ ─ ┼ ─ ─ ─ ─ ─ ─ ─ ─ ─ ┐ │ │ │ ▼ ▼ ▼ ╔═══════════╗ ╔═══════════╗ ╔═══════════╗ ║ ║ ║ ║ ║ ║ ║ Primary ║ ║ Primary ║ ║ Primary ║ ║ ║ ║ ║ ║ ║ ╚═══════════╝ ╚═══════════╝ ╚═══════════╝ │ │ │ ─ ─ ┴ ─ ─ ─ ─ ┴ ─ ─ ─ ─ ┴ ─ ─ │ │ │ │ │ │ ▼ ▼ ▼ ▼ ▼ ▼ ┌───────┐ ┌───────┐ ┌───────┐ ┌───────┐ ┌───────┐ ┌───────┐ │Replica│ │Replica│ │Replica│ │Replica│ │Replica│ │Replica│ └───────┘ └───────┘ └───────┘ └───────┘ └───────┘ └───────┘ ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░│ │░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░VTGate░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░│ │░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░│ └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘ │ ─ ─ ─ ─ ─

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Hi [CTO Name], this is [SDR Name] from DeepData AI. I hope I'm not catching you at a bad time. I was doing some research on [Company Name]'s innovative work with cloud-native databases, particularly your impressive use of PlanetScale and Vitess.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: [SDR Name], thanks for reaching out. We're always interested in new technologies, but we're pretty heads-down with our current roadmap. What specifically are you looking to discuss?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: I understand you're busy, and I'll be brief. We help companies like yours optimize their data processing pipelines, especially those leveraging highly scalable database solutions like PlanetScale. DeepData AI specializes in accelerating data ingestion and analysis for applications handling millions of queries per second, similar to the scale you're operating at. We’ve seen significant improvements for our clients in terms of processing speed and cost reduction.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: That's an interesting claim. We've already invested a considerable amount in optimizing our internal data workflows, and we have a pretty robust set of tools in place. We're actually quite happy with our current performance metrics and the stability we're seeing with PlanetScale. Have you seen specific examples of companies with similar architectures to ours achieving quantifiable benefits with DeepData AI?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Absolutely. For instance, one of our recent clients, a large e-commerce platform, was experiencing latency issues with their real-time analytics due to the sheer volume of data coming from their sharded Vitess clusters. After implementing DeepData AI, they saw a 40% reduction in query times for their analytical dashboards and a 25% decrease in their overall data processing costs. We believe a similar uplift could be achievable for [Company Name].

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: A 40% reduction is certainly attention-grabbing, but the devil is in the details. Our current solution integrates quite tightly with our existing infrastructure, and we're very cautious about introducing new dependencies. The integration effort and potential compatibility issues with our custom Vitess configurations are a significant concern for us. Plus, we're already evaluating a couple of other data processing platforms that are in a similar vein.

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: I appreciate that concern, and we’ve designed DeepData AI with seamless integration in mind. We offer flexible APIs and have a proven track record of integrating with complex cloud-native environments, including those built around Vitess. Our implementation process is designed to be non-disruptive, and we typically see clients fully operational within a few weeks. Regarding your evaluation, would you be open to a brief 15-minute overview of our platform and how it specifically addresses the challenges of high-throughput, sharded databases, perhaps focusing on the unique advantages over other solutions you might be considering?

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: [SDR Name], I understand you're doing your job, and the results you mentioned are impressive on paper. However, at this moment, our priorities are focused elsewhere, and the integration overhead, coupled with our ongoing vendor evaluations, makes this a difficult time to explore new solutions. We've got our plates full, and frankly, adding another vendor to the mix right now isn't feasible. I'd appreciate it if you could send over an email with some general information, but we won't be able to schedule a call or dive deeper at this time.

analysis.raw:
Score: 3
Outcome: Failure
Key_Objection: Timing
Feedback: The SDR should have focused on understanding the CTO's current roadmap and priorities before presenting the solution. Sentiment: Neutral

parsed.feedback: The SDR should have focused on understanding the CTO's current roadmap and priorities before presenting the solution. Sentiment: Neutral
